metadata.title: Strange New Worlds
metadata.description: Help see how your vault is interconnected with visual indicators.

regex.source: Notice(`File not found: ${filePath}. It may be a broken link.`)
regex.target: Notice(`文件未发现: ${filePath}. 链接可能损坏.`)

regex.source: name: "Toggle active state of SNW plugin on/off"
text: "(requires reopening documents to take effect)"
regex.target: text: "(需要重新打开文档才能生效)"

regex.source: .setName("On the desktop enable SNW at startup")
.setName("On mobile devices enable SNW at startup")

regex.target: .setName("显示计数器所需的最小计数值")

regex.source: .setName(`Use Obsidian's Excluded Files list (Settings > Files & Links)`)
regex.target: .setName(`使用Obsidian的排除文件列表 (Settings > Files & Links)`)
.setName("在桌面程序上的属性中显示引文")
.setName("在移动设备上的属性中显示引文")

regex.source: .setName("Show SNW indicators in Live Preview Editor")
regex.target: .setName("在“实时预览编辑器”下显示SNW指示器")
.setName("在“源代码模式”下显示SNW指示器 ")

regex.source: .setName("Embed references in Gutter in Live Preview Mode (Desktop)")
regex.target: .setName("在实时预览模式中嵌入(references in)Gutter (桌面端)")

regex.source: .setName("Embed references in Gutter in Live Preview Mode (Mobile)")
regex.target: .setName("在实时预览模式中嵌入(references in)Gutter  (移动端)")
.setName("在“读取模式”中启用引用类型")

regex.source: .setName("Enable reference types in Live Preview Mode")
regex.target: .setName("在实时预览模式中启用引用模式")

regex.source:
.setDesc(
      `If enabled, SNW will only activate when the modifier key is pressed when hovering the mouse over an SNW counter.  
						Otherwise, SNW will activate on a mouse hover. May require reopening open files to take effect.`
    )
regex.target:
.setDesc(
      `如果启用，则当将鼠标悬停在SNW计数器上并按下修饰键时，SNW才会激活。   
						否则，SNW将在鼠标悬停时激活。 可能需要重新打开文件才能生效。 `
    )

regex.source:
.setDesc(
      `This setting defines how many references there needs to be for the reference count box to appear. May require reloading open files.
				 Currently set to: ${this.plugin.settings.minimumRefCountThreshold} references.`
    )
regex.target:
.setDesc(
      `此设置定义了需要多少引文才能显示引用计数框。 可能需要重新加载打开的文件。   
				 当前设置为: ${this.plugin.settings.minimumRefCountThreshold} references.`
    )

regex.source: .setDesc("In header of a document, show number of incoming link to that file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文档的标题中，显示到该文件的入链的数量。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc(`This is off by default on mobile since the gutter takes up some space in the left margin.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`这在手机上默认是关闭的，因为gutter占据了左边的一些空间。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Identifies block ID's, for example text blocks that end with a ^ and unique ID for that text block.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标识块ID，例如以^结尾的文本块和该文本块的唯一ID。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("Identifies embedded links, that is links that start with an explanation mark. For example: ![[PageName]].")
regex.target: .setDesc("标识嵌入的链接，即以解释标记开头的链接。 例如：![[PageName]] . ")

regex.source: .setDesc("Identifies links in a document. For example: [[PageName]].")
.setDesc("Identifies headers, that is lines of text that start with a hash mark or multiple hash marks. For example: # Heading 1.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标识标题，即以一个或多个散列标记开头的文本行。 例如：# Heading 1 .")
